reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Spec deviation confirmed: implementation checks fc.HasNode(parentRoot) instead of verifying finalized checkpoint ancestry via get_checkpoint_block(). However, practical security impact is limited - data columns on non-canonical forks do not lead to invalid block acceptance and are eventually pruned. This finding matches Sherlock issue #257 (same on Lighthouse) which was judged as Informational. Downgraded from Critical to Informational per severity_classification thresholds - no direct network impact demonstrated.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/master/specs/fulu/p2p-interface.md#data_column_sidecar_subnet_id - REJECT condition: get_checkpoint_block(store, block_header.parent_root, store.finalized_checkpoint.epoch) == store.finalized_checkpoint.root
